description: Split the audio signal into fixed length chunks of 256 samples.

properties.note: UI-only: controls whether the container is displayed vertically or horizontally in the scriptnode graph. No effect on audio processing.

gaps.question: Is the processing logic of fix_block<256> identical to fix_block<8> except for the template parameter N=256? Are there any block-size-specific optimisations or edge cases?
gaps.context: If identical, the doc can reference the base variant (fix8_block) and note only the block size difference.

notes: Variant of fixN_block group with N=256. References fix8_block exploration for all shared logic. Existing phase3 doc is a bare stub with no content (summary placeholder not filled in).
